article_title: Apple Vision Pro Gains NVIDIA CloudXR Streaming and Steam Link Beta as visionOS 26.4 Targets Gaming and Enterprise

content_preview.title: Apple Vision Pro Gains NVIDIA CloudXR Streaming and Steam Link Beta as visionOS 26.4 Targets Gaming and Enterprise
content_preview.summary: visionOS 26.4 brings NVIDIA CloudXR 6.0 for RTX-powered enterprise and gaming apps, while Valve launches a native Steam Link beta for PC game streaming on Vision Pro.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Apple Vision Pro is receiving its most significant content and capability expansion since launch, with two developments arriving in quick succession: NVIDIA's CloudXR 6.0 streaming framework, which shipped alongside visionOS 26.4 in late March, and Valve's native Steam Link app for visionOS, which entered public beta on April 7. Together, the updates position Vision Pro as a viable endpoint for both high-fidelity enterprise visualization and mainstream PC gaming -- two areas where t...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured tech article covering two related Vision Pro updates. Good separation of CloudXR and Steam Link sections.
editor_notes.source_verification: 3 sources checked. NVIDIA blog: VERIFIED — confirms CloudXR 6.0, foveated streaming, gaze data privacy, Jeff Norris quote, enterprise partners (BMW, Kia, Rivian, Volvo, Foxconn, Switch, Roche), Autodesk VRED, X-Plane 12, iRacing. 9to5Mac Steam Link article: VERIFIED — confirms April 7 beta via TestFlight, 4K streaming, 2D only, panoramic mode with curved display. 9to5Mac CloudXR article: VERIFIED — confirms visionOS 26.4, foveated streaming, multi-platform Xcode templates, Swift framework. Note: article claims '8 Mbps' bandwidth but NVIDIA blog mentions '4K resolution' without the specific bandwidth figure; 9to5Mac article may have had it but WebFetch summary didn't capture it. Minor.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All major claims verified: CloudXR 6.0 partnership, foveated streaming with gaze privacy, enterprise partners list, Steam Link beta April 7 via TestFlight, 2D-only streaming, developer tools. Jeff Norris quote confirmed.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral throughout. No promotional language despite covering product announcements.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Vision Pro CloudXR or Steam Link coverage.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Solid tech product article with all claims verified. Approved.
